steps.title: Calculate the unit rate of chopping
steps.content:
The chopper slices 15 pounds in 3 minutes. Find the unit rate (pounds per minute):
$$\frac{15}{3} = 5 \text{ pounds per minute}$$

steps.title: Use the unit rate to find the time for 90 pounds
steps.content:
Divide 90 pounds by the unit rate of 5 pounds per minute to find the time needed:
$$\frac{90}{5} = 18 \text{ minutes}$$
That is the correct answer.
